title: Excalibur | Dis-Enchanting Table Support
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08fb7c7ce8ef80d4626cd9f64878046be569969a.png)

This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Dis-Enchanting Table](https://modrinth.com/mod/dis-enchanting-table) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned Table
- GUIs for Excalibur style

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- Lupin - Creator of _Dis-Enchanting Table_


If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-dis-enchanting-table-support)
